description: header-only scan of one DICOM series folder; emits inventory/orientation/PHI findings + pass/warn/fail verdict (read-only)
rules: read-only — headers only, stop_before_pixels; never decodes pixel data or mutates inputs
output JSON written to record_store; verdict is pass/warn/fail
usage: Set DICOM_DIR (one DICOM series directory). Output: preflight.json.
limitation: Header-only; does not decode pixel data or detect burnt-in PHI. Canonical orientation gate assumes LPS-derived CT axcodes L,P,S. Compressed transfer syntax and multi-frame instances are warned, not decoded. Single-directory scan; does not reconcile multiple studies in one tree. Not for clinical deployment, regulatory de-identification, or autonomous diagnosis.
